name: stripe-installer
description: Django + React Stripe setup with encrypted write-only vault

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run migrate
